weighting_rationale: Use the method matched to the economic claim. Treat specialist opinions as tests, not weights, and do not average incompatible methods.
agreed_facts: All material components have explicit low/base/high estimates and overlap controls.
disputed_facts: An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.
The arbitration record does not disclose claimed amount, timing, probability or collectibility.
recommendation: research_blocked; do not advance to a security decision until the critical acceptance tests are met.

operational_milestones: Reconcile operator reserve and production schedule to royalty tiers.
Obtain a primary arbitration award, settlement or disclosed claim schedule.
Refresh audited unallocated reserve each quarter.
thesis_break_conditions: Supported recoverable tonnage or cadence falls below the low case.
The legal remedy is dismissed or limited to ordinary royalties already modeled.
